telegram-chatbot.project: Telegram Chatbot for B2B Lead Generation
telegram-chatbot.description: Built an end-to-end system for B2B lead generation with referral tracking and CRM integration
telegram-chatbot.challenge: A company with a complex AI-based diagnostics tool wanted to expand their B2B reach. Their goal was to let small businesses onboard easily, allow employees to generate referral codes, and enable end-users to access the diagnostics experience without needing to install an app — all while tracking leads and syncing with their CRM.
telegram-chatbot.solution:
We built an end-to-end system comprising:

- A user, business, and referral management platform
- A Telegram bot replicating the diagnostics experience from their mobile app
- Lead detection logic based on quiz responses and user actions
- Integration with their ML-powered diagnostics backend
- Real-time syncing with their CRM for lead attribution and payouts

End-users could enter a referral code, go through diagnostics, view past results, and get updates — all within Telegram. The system logged every interaction, linked leads to the referring business and employee, and triggered payouts accordingly.
results: 1000+ referrals processed in the first weeks
24/7 diagnostics access — no app install needed
Lower barrier to adoption in Telegram-heavy markets
Fully automated, scalable lead generation with transparent attribution

testimonial.quote: The Telegram bot has revolutionized how we reach and serve our B2B customers, making our diagnostics tool accessible to a whole new market segment.
testimonial.author: Product Manager

api-gateway.description: Developed a robust API gateway for microservices architecture
api-gateway.challenge: A client needed to manage multiple microservices with different authentication methods and rate limiting requirements.
api-gateway.solution: We built a centralized API gateway that handles authentication, rate limiting, and request routing across all microservices.

testimonial.quote: The API gateway has streamlined our microservices architecture, making it easier to manage and secure our services.
testimonial.author: Technical Director

cross-platform-mvp.description: Launched a cross-platform mobile app in record time
cross-platform-mvp.challenge: A startup needed to quickly validate their product idea with a cross-platform mobile app while maintaining high performance.
cross-platform-mvp.solution: We developed a Flutter-based MVP that delivered native performance across iOS and Android with a single codebase.

fitness-tracking.description: Created a fitness tracking app with real-time analytics
fitness-tracking.challenge: A fitness company needed a mobile app that could track workouts, provide real-time feedback, and sync with various fitness devices.
fitness-tracking.solution: We built a React Native app with native device integration, real-time tracking, and personalized workout recommendations.

testimonial.quote: The app has transformed how our users track their fitness journey, providing a seamless experience across devices.
testimonial.author: Product Director

llm-integration.description: Created a flexible SDK for enterprise LLM integration
llm-integration.challenge: Multiple enterprise clients needed to integrate LLMs into their existing workflows but were struggling with security and implementation complexity.
llm-integration.solution: We developed a flexible SDK that handles authentication, rate limiting, prompt management, and model switching.

testimonial.quote: The SDK has made it incredibly easy to integrate LLMs into our enterprise applications while maintaining the highest security standards.
testimonial.author: CTO

sales-forecasting.description: Built an AI-powered sales forecasting system
sales-forecasting.challenge: A retail chain needed accurate sales predictions to optimize inventory management and reduce costs.
sales-forecasting.solution: We developed a machine learning model that analyzes historical data, seasonal trends, and external factors to predict sales.

testimonial.quote: The forecasting system has significantly improved our inventory management and reduced costs across all stores.
testimonial.author: Operations Director

predictive-analytics.description: Implemented predictive analytics for business intelligence
predictive-analytics.challenge: A company needed to predict customer behavior and market trends to make data-driven decisions.
predictive-analytics.solution: We built a comprehensive analytics system that combines multiple data sources and ML models to provide actionable insights.

testimonial.quote: The predictive analytics system has transformed our decision-making process, providing accurate insights that drive business growth.
testimonial.author: Analytics Director

data-viz.challenge: A client needed to make complex data accessible and actionable for non-technical stakeholders.
data-viz.solution: We developed interactive dashboards with real-time data visualization and custom reporting features.

testimonial.quote: The visualization dashboards have made our data accessible to everyone in the organization, leading to better-informed decisions.
testimonial.author: Data Director
